Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We are going to construct an accepting Petri net for the given insurance claim process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 We will create a Petri net object 2 We will define places for each state and some intermediate places if necessary 3 We will define transitions for each activity 4 We will connect the places and transitions with arcs to model the process flow 5 We will set the initial marking a token in the start place and the final marking a token in the end place

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process description The process starts with a claim C We can have a start place for the claim Then Claim Registration CR occurs Then Document Verification DV occurs After DV there is a possibility of re submission RDS if documents are incomplete This is a loop between DV and RDS until documents are complete Then Fraud Check FC occurs After FC if doubts then In depth Investigation II occurs possibly multiple times This is a loop between FC and II Then Claim Assessment CA occurs Then Approval AP occurs if the amount surpasses the threshold Then Payment P occurs Then Notification N occurs Then Closure CL occurs

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We have two possibilities either the amount is below the threshold so no approval needed or above so approval needed This can be modeled by a choice after CA We can have two transitions one for Approval and one for Skip Approval Alternatively we can have a transition for Approval and a transition for No Approval which is a silent transition Lets use a silent transition for the case when approval is not required

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will model the process with the following places start after CR after DV after RDS after FC after II after CA after approval after payment after notification end

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets note the loops DV to RDS to DV loop until complete then proceed to FC FC to II to FC loop until no doubts then proceed to CA

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Alternatively we can have two transitions from after DV one transition silent for the complete case which then leads to the FC transition and one transition for RDS

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Lets restructure We can have a place for claim needs dv which is the state before DV Initially after CR we are in claim needs dv Then we do DV and go to after DV Then from after DV if incomplete we go to a place for claim needs rds then do RDS and then go back to claim needs dv

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets try to keep it simple Well have a place called after DV that holds the token after DV Then we have two transitions from after DV RDS which goes to a place after RDS and then from after RDS we go back to the place that leads to DV after DV to FC This is acceptable because after DV either we do RDS or we do FC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will do the same for FC and II after FC to II to after II to after FC and after FC to CA to after CA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the approval step we have two transitions from after CA Approval AP to after approval and silent skip approval to after approval The token will be consumed by one of them

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must also set the initial marking im to have one token in start and the final marking fm to have one token in end

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now the arcs start to CR to after CR after CR to DV to after DV after DV to RDS to after RDS after RDS to DV to after DV after DV to FC to after FC after FC to II to after II after II to FC to after FC after FC to CA to after CA after CA to AP to after approval after CA to skip approval to after approval after approval to P to after payment after payment to N to after notification after notification to CL to end

Name: Validation - PE
Text: However note that the loops are self contained the token after DV can either go to RDS or to FC Similarly after FC the token can either go to II or to CA
